Event: The Prince of Darkness Castle Siege
Event Date: 04/04/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A214
Life Elixir Artifact

Triggers: when health is critical

Retribution Shield
The artifact owner removes all debuffs and gains a shield that absorbs 65% of incoming damage for 4 sec. Also during this time, every second, the artifact owner fires a missile at a random enemy. On hit, the missile explodes and deals 350000 magic damage to the target and all enemies in a small radius around it, and stuns each affected enemy for 1,5 sec. The artifact owner restores health equal to 50% of the damage dealt.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: The Prince of Darkness Castle Siege

Event date: 04/04/2025

Sage bot code: A214

First trigger: when health is critical
